ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_in_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "energy_sector_investment" REAL /* Amount of investment in the energy sector */,
  "renewable_energy_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of energy consumption from renewable sources */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the data */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "yoy_change_percentage" REAL /* Year-over-year change percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the energy data */,
  "renewable_portion" REAL /* Percentage of the energy consumption that is renewable */,
  "fossil_fuel_portion" REAL /* Percentage of the energy consumption that is from fossil fuels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cumulative_energy_data" (
  "cumulative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cumulative data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "consumption_jan_feb" REAL /* Cumulative energy consumption for January and February */,
  "yoy_change_percentage" REAL /* Year-over-year change percentage */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the cumulative energy data */,
  "renewable_portion" REAL /* Percentage of the cumulative energy consumption that is renewable */,
  "fossil_fuel_portion" REAL /* Percentage of the cumulative energy consumption that is from fossil fuels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cumulative data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cumulative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cumulative_energy_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the forecast */,
  "predicted_consumption" REAL /* Predicted energy consumption */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "renewable_forecast" REAL /* Predicted amount of renewable energy consumption */,
  "fossil_fuel_forecast" REAL /* Predicted amount of fossil fuel energy consumption */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_forecasts_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the indicator */,
  "gdp_growth" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "industry_output" REAL /* Industrial output rate */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  "energy_investment" REAL /* Amount of investment in the energy sector */,
  "renewable_energy_investment" REAL /* Amount of investment in renewable energy */,
  "fossil_fuel_investment" REAL /* Amount of investment in fossil fuels */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the economic indicators were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES energy_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image or document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visualization */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_access_logs_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
